title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Byju's - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Backend Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
